gist.headline: Redecorate the hive
gist.blurb: Rooms Vision just landed in the community greenhouse! Upload a photo of your room and let AI reimagine it in Minimalist, Industrial, or Bohemian styles.
gist.summary: Added Rooms Vision to the community app showcase, a tool for visualizing architectural and stylistic changes to room photos.
gist.impact: Users can now explore AI-powered interior design by applying different style layers to their own room photos while preserving structural integrity.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an interior design app that changes room styles. The bee (Polly) should be acting as an interior designer, wearing a tiny painter's beret or holding a blueprint/color palette. The scene is a cozy room being transformed, with the robot companion helping out.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding a color palette while looking at a glowing blueprint of a cozy room. A chunky retro robot companion holds up a picture frame showing a beautifully redesigned bohemian living room. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
